headline: Can Capital One Prove Itself in 2026?
summary: Capital One Financial enters 2026 at a critical juncture, as its Discover acquisition and rising credit risks test its ability to deliver sustained growth.

headline: Capital One's Series I Preferred Stock Offers Decent Yield And Potential Capital Gain
summary: COF.PR.I preferred offers a high yield and a 25.6% discount, with call-driven upside if rates fall. Read why I rate COF.PR.I stock a buy now.
